channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: China blocks Meta from acquiring AI startup Manus
item.description: Meta said Monday that the transaction "complied fully with applicable law" and that it anticipates "an appropriate resolution to the inquiry."
item.content:encoded:
Meta said Monday that the transaction "complied fully with applicable law" and that it anticipates "an appropriate resolution to the inquiry."

(Image credit: Jeff Chiu/AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Alleged Correspondents' Dinner shooter to appear in court. And, Charles III visits U.S.
item.description: The suspect in the White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting incident is set to appear in federal court today. And, King Charles III and Queen Camilla arrive in Washington today for a state visit.
item.content:encoded:
The suspect in the White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting incident is set to appear in federal court today. And, King Charles III and Queen Camilla arrive in Washington today for a state visit.

(Image credit: Andrew Harnik)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: Iran's flurry of diplomacy, as Trump insists U.S. has 'the cards'
item.description: Iran's foreign minister arrived in Russia on Monday, after a whirlwind weekend of diplomacy, seeking to gain political leverage and foreign backing as peace talks with the U.S. remain on hold.
item.content:encoded:
Iran's foreign minister arrived in Russia on Monday, after a whirlwind weekend of diplomacy, seeking to gain political leverage and foreign backing as peace talks with the U.S. remain on hold.

(Image credit: Iranian Foreign Ministry)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Inflation is sucking the life out of teacher pay raises, report says
item.description: A new review of state education data shows teacher pay increases can't keep up with inflation and fewer students are enrolled in public schools.
item.content:encoded: A new review of state education data shows teacher pay increases can't keep up with inflation and fewer students are enrolled in public schools.
item.dc:creator: Cory Turner

item.title: Alleged White House Correspondents' Dinner shooter set to appear in federal court
item.description: The suspected gunman will face charges, including assault on a federal officer using a dangerous weapon.
item.content:encoded:
The suspected gunman will face charges, including assault on a federal officer using a dangerous weapon.

(Image credit: Andrew Harnik)
item.dc:creator: Joe Hernandez

item.title: Climate disaster victims are rebuilding using prefab homes from boxy to bespoke
item.description: Wildfires, hurricanes, tornadoes and floods fueled by manmade climate change are changing the housing industry. That's because people are embracing prefab homes that can withstand extreme weather.
item.content:encoded:
Wildfires, hurricanes, tornadoes and floods fueled by manmade climate change are changing the housing industry. That's because people are embracing prefab homes that can withstand extreme weather.

(Image credit: Vanessa Romo)
item.dc:creator: Vanessa Romo

item.title: Ingenious? Orwellian? Or both? Supreme Court considers constitutionality of 'geofence' warrants
item.description: The technique allows police to tap into giant tech-firm databases to find out who was near the scene of a crime and may have been involved.
item.content:encoded: The technique allows police to tap into giant tech-firm databases to find out who was near the scene of a crime and may have been involved.
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg

item.title: Scientists search the microbiome for clues to the rise in colorectal cancers
item.description: Unlike many cancers, colorectal cancer has become more lethal for people at younger ages. Doctors are sleuthing out why.
item.content:encoded: Unlike many cancers, colorectal cancer has become more lethal for people at younger ages. Doctors are sleuthing out why.
item.dc:creator: Yuki Noguchi

item.title: Musk vs. Altman: Tech CEOs head to court over the fate of OpenAI
item.description: The former OpenAI business partners are embroiled in a high-stakes dispute over the future of one of the world's top AI companies.
item.content:encoded:
The former OpenAI business partners are embroiled in a high-stakes dispute over the future of one of the world's top AI companies.

(Image credit: Michael Kovac/Getty Images for Vanity Fair)
item.dc:creator: John Ruwitch

item.title: Palestinian officials hail local elections in a Gaza community and the West Bank
item.description: Palestinian officials say local elections in Gaza and the West Bank mark a step toward a long-delayed presidential election. The Palestinian Authority hasn't held a presidential election in 21 years.
item.content:encoded:
Palestinian officials say local elections in Gaza and the West Bank mark a step toward a long-delayed presidential election. The Palestinian Authority hasn't held a presidential election in 21 years.

(Image credit: Mahmoud Illean)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
